name: sketch-mcp-server
description: Collaborative SVG canvas MCP server with Fabric.js browser editor

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && bun build src/main.ts --outdir dist --target node --entry-naming index.js && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/index.tmp && mv dist/index.tmp dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
